ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing product (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the clothing product (e.g., t-shirts, jeans, skirts) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing product (e.g., cotton, polyester, wool) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing product */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the clothing product (e.g., casual, formal, streetwear) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing size (e.g., S, M, L, XL, 2XL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing size */,
  "chest_circumference" REAL /* Chest circumference for the size */,
  "waist_circumference" REAL /* Waist circumference for the size */,
  "hip_circumference" REAL /* Hip circumference for the size */,
  "height_range" TEXT /* Height range for the size (e.g., 5'0"-5'4") */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing product the measurement belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing size the measurement belongs to */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "top_length" REAL /* Top length measurement in inches */,
  "bottom_length" REAL /* Bottom length measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "pant_length" REAL /* Pant length measurement in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES clothing_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-size combination */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing size */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level for the product-size combination */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product-size combination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES clothing_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, product manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing product ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing size ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES clothing_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "customer_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who the measurement belongs to */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "height" REAL /* Height in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight in pounds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing product in the order */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing size in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES clothing_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
